meaning: adj.互相残杀的,两败俱伤的,内部冲突的
examples: The internecine strife was caused by a shortage of food.
Therefore, is unavoidable the internecine strife started.
The internecine struggle had pitted Mr. Valdez against Mr. Beltrán Leyva’s brother, Hector.
Even though the whites were prone to turn on each other, their internecine squabbles proved irrelevant.
The situation is being made worse by flooding, fighting and an internecine conflict between different rebel groups.
